positive: A breathtaking, highly stylized illustration of a magical forest canopy at twilight. The central elements feature bioluminescent flora, swirling constellations integrated into large, stylized leaves, and graceful, stylized woodland sprites forming a harmonious, cyclical pattern. Use a deep jewel-toned palette of sapphire blues, emerald greens, and glowing lavender accents. The composition must be symmetrical and centrally balanced, utilizing clean, strong silhouettes for maximum impact on fabric. Focus on highly intricate linework, perfect symmetry, and a mythic, dreamlike atmosphere. Vector illustration style, graphic novel quality, high contrast, deep saturation, concept art suitable for apparel print.
negative: low quality, blurry, artifacts, text, watermarks, messy, sketch, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grayscale, monochrome, grainy, photorealistic, muted colors, logos, trademarks
